raw_text: miguel villar alvarez & mvillaralvarez@gmail.com born june 20, 1991 (age 24) oct 2014 - present sept 2009 - feb 2015 2007-2009 2012-2013 2013-2014 ii spanish english ii basic c/ carranza 4 19 3 int 28004, madrid spain hs +34 647560254 fl dni 71893934m experience project engineer, jsf hidraulica. o design aluminium structures with sap2000 program: domes and plain covers. o cost estimation of aluminium covers to prepare offers. o make drawings to aprove the design and to manufacture the covers. o prepare installation, operation and maintenance manuals of the covers. o project planning from the design until the delivery. o monitoring of the manufacture process. education msc aeronautical engineer, 5-year degree (intensification air- craft and space vehicles. option: aircraft design), universidad politécnica de madrid, madrid, spain (average grade - 7.0). related document: academic transcript of records. high school graduate (science), colegio san fernando, avilés, spain (average grade - 9.0). basic catia, upm, madrid, spain (30h). advanced catia, upm, madrid, spain (30h). languages mothertongue b2 level (fce, june 2016) computer skills fortran 90, maple, esacomp, matlab, auto- cad, ms project intermediate microsoft office, lyx, mathcad, sap2000 advanced catia v5 ms (her skills practises preliminary design of 20 mw wind turbine (degree project), sizing aircraft icing system, balancing of a puma helicopter and control and stability of a puma helicopter communicativecolegio mayor isabel de espana (2009-2012) driving b license mms ) terests - tennis (8 years playing) -movies -technology -cars -planes
